name: io.github.mshegolev/allure-testops-mcp
description: Allure TestOps MCP — projects, launches, test cases, test results via REST API.

environmentVariables.name: ALLURE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API token from Allure TestOps (Profile -> API tokens)

environmentVariables.name: ALLURE_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed corp certs.
